snippets.description: CreateAnnotationSpecSet creates an annotation spec set by providing a set of labels.
snippets.title: datalabeling CreateAnnotationSpecSet Sample

snippets.description: CreateDataset creates dataset. If success return a Dataset resource.
snippets.title: datalabeling CreateDataset Sample

snippets.description: CreateEvaluationJob creates an evaluation job.
snippets.title: datalabeling CreateEvaluationJob Sample

snippets.description: CreateInstruction creates an instruction for how data should be labeled.
snippets.title: datalabeling CreateInstruction Sample

snippets.description: DeleteAnnotatedDataset deletes an annotated dataset by resource name.
snippets.title: datalabeling DeleteAnnotatedDataset Sample

snippets.description: DeleteAnnotationSpecSet deletes an annotation spec set by resource name.
snippets.title: datalabeling DeleteAnnotationSpecSet Sample

snippets.description: DeleteDataset deletes a dataset by resource name.
snippets.title: datalabeling DeleteDataset Sample

snippets.description: DeleteEvaluationJob stops and deletes an evaluation job.
snippets.title: datalabeling DeleteEvaluationJob Sample

snippets.description: DeleteInstruction deletes an instruction object by resource name.
snippets.title: datalabeling DeleteInstruction Sample

snippets.description: ExportData exports data and annotations from dataset.
snippets.title: datalabeling ExportData Sample

snippets.description: GetAnnotatedDataset gets an annotated dataset by resource name.
snippets.title: datalabeling GetAnnotatedDataset Sample

snippets.description: GetAnnotationSpecSet gets an annotation spec set by resource name.
snippets.title: datalabeling GetAnnotationSpecSet Sample

snippets.description:
GetDataItem gets a data item in a dataset by resource name. This API can be
called after data are imported into dataset.
snippets.title: datalabeling GetDataItem Sample

snippets.description: GetDataset gets dataset by resource name.
snippets.title: datalabeling GetDataset Sample

snippets.description:
GetEvaluation gets an evaluation by resource name (to search, use
[projects.evaluations.search][google.cloud.datalabeling.v1beta1.DataLabelingService.SearchEvaluations]).
snippets.title: datalabeling GetEvaluation Sample

snippets.description: GetEvaluationJob gets an evaluation job by resource name.
snippets.title: datalabeling GetEvaluationJob Sample

snippets.description: GetExample gets an example by resource name, including both data and annotation.
snippets.title: datalabeling GetExample Sample

snippets.description: GetInstruction gets an instruction by resource name.
snippets.title: datalabeling GetInstruction Sample

snippets.description:
ImportData imports data into dataset based on source locations defined in request.
It can be called multiple times for the same dataset. Each dataset can
only have one long running operation running on it. For example, no
labeling task (also long running operation) can be started while
importing is still ongoing. Vice versa.
snippets.title: datalabeling ImportData Sample

snippets.description:
LabelImage starts a labeling task for image. The type of image labeling task is
configured by feature in the request.
snippets.title: datalabeling LabelImage Sample

snippets.description:
LabelText starts a labeling task for text. The type of text labeling task is
configured by feature in the request.
snippets.title: datalabeling LabelText Sample

snippets.description:
LabelVideo starts a labeling task for video. The type of video labeling task is
configured by feature in the request.
snippets.title: datalabeling LabelVideo Sample

snippets.description: ListAnnotatedDatasets lists annotated datasets for a dataset. Pagination is supported.
snippets.title: datalabeling ListAnnotatedDatasets Sample

snippets.description: ListAnnotationSpecSets lists annotation spec sets for a project. Pagination is supported.
snippets.title: datalabeling ListAnnotationSpecSets Sample

snippets.description:
ListDataItems lists data items in a dataset. This API can be called after data
are imported into dataset. Pagination is supported.
snippets.title: datalabeling ListDataItems Sample

snippets.description: ListDatasets lists datasets under a project. Pagination is supported.
snippets.title: datalabeling ListDatasets Sample

snippets.description:
ListEvaluationJobs lists all evaluation jobs within a project with possible filters.
Pagination is supported.
snippets.title: datalabeling ListEvaluationJobs Sample

snippets.description: ListExamples lists examples in an annotated dataset. Pagination is supported.
snippets.title: datalabeling ListExamples Sample

snippets.description: ListInstructions lists instructions for a project. Pagination is supported.
snippets.title: datalabeling ListInstructions Sample

snippets.description:
PauseEvaluationJob pauses an evaluation job. Pausing an evaluation job that is already in a
`PAUSED` state is a no-op.
snippets.title: datalabeling PauseEvaluationJob Sample

snippets.description:
ResumeEvaluationJob resumes a paused evaluation job. A deleted evaluation job can't be resumed.
Resuming a running or scheduled evaluation job is a no-op.
snippets.title: datalabeling ResumeEvaluationJob Sample

snippets.description: SearchEvaluations searches [evaluations][google.cloud.datalabeling.v1beta1.Evaluation] within a project.
snippets.title: datalabeling SearchEvaluations Sample

snippets.description:
SearchExampleComparisons searches example comparisons from an evaluation. The return format is a
list of example comparisons that show ground truth and prediction(s) for
a single input. Search by providing an evaluation ID.
snippets.title: datalabeling SearchExampleComparisons Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateEvaluationJob updates an evaluation job. You can only update certain fields of the job's
[EvaluationJobConfig][google.cloud.datalabeling.v1beta1.EvaluationJobConfig]: `humanAnnotationConfig.instruction`,
`exampleCount`, and `exampleSamplePercentage`.

If you want to change any other aspect of the evaluation job, you must
delete the job and create a new one.
snippets.title: datalabeling UpdateEvaluationJob Sample
